diagnosis.root_cause_1: 42001 dsv4p_uni42001 orphaned container with broken DATABASE_URL (litellm_dsv4p DB never created)
diagnosis.root_cause_2: docker-compose services not started (postgres, 41001, 40001, 40002 all down)
diagnosis.root_cause_3: litellm-glm51/config.yaml used mixed-case model names (ZHipuAI/GlM-5.1 etc) that ModelScope rejects for GLM models
diagnosis.root_cause_4: rpm=14 too high for ModelScope free-tier keys (actual limit ~2-3 RPM per key)

fixes_applied.fix_1: Stopped and removed orphaned dsv4p_uni42001 container
fixes_applied.fix_2: Started full docker-compose stack: cc_postgres + glm5.1_uni41001 + auth_to_api_40001 + auth_to_api_40002
fixes_applied.fix_3: Rewrote litellm-glm51/config.yaml: removed 140+ mixed-case deployments, kept only 21 tier-1 lowercase deployments (7 keys × 3 models)
fixes_applied.fix_4: Reduced rpm from 14 to 2 per deployment (matches ModelScope free-tier actual limits)
fixes_applied.fix_6: Added 3-model fallback chain: glm5.1 → dsv4p → glm5 (bidirectional)
fixes_applied.fix_7: Increased num_retries from 3 to 5 (more resilience against transient 429s)
fixes_applied.fix_8: Added allowed_openai_params for GLM models (enables reasoning_effort, response_format etc)
fixes_applied.fix_9: Increased request_timeout from 300 to 600s (longer for DSv4P heavy requests)

post_fix_test_results.40001_anth_glm51: PASS - full Anthropic format response with thinking+text blocks
post_fix_test_results.40001_anth_dsv4p: PASS - DSv4P via Anthropic format works

optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_1: Reduce ConnectionRefusedError by adding persistent connection pool in proxy
optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_2: Add per-key RPM tracking and automatic key rotation
optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_3: Add streaming response caching for repeated tool calls
optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_4: Monitor actual RPM per key and adjust litellm_config dynamically
